rows.notes: Clear centered page year at top of page, no amounts present. Legible and unambiguous.
Clear heading underlined. Handwriting legible though the word 'Donus' might be variant of 'Donor' but transcribed exactly as it appears.

Pounds digits (hundreds) moderately unclear — the hundreds digit could be 5(2/3) or similar. Shillings '3' and pence '11' with a clear half-penny loop (interpreted as 0.5) are legible. Column alignment is consistent with other rows but hundreds digit uncertainty lowers confidence.
Numbers are well-placed beneath the pounds/shillings/pence ruling. '235' pounds and '18' shillings read clearly; pence '3' unambiguous.
Description possibly abbreviated ('Divs' for dividends) but readable. Numeric columns align; 7 pounds 4 shillings 10 pence clear.
Description contains additional ledger notation referencing composition; amount '175 6 0' reads clearly and columns align well.
This is a continuation/sub-item of Masters Composition showing combined amounts; pounds '67', shillings '12', pence '6' are well aligned and legible.
Another sub-line of the Masters Composition group. Values '68 7 0' read consistently in the pounds/shillings/pence columns.
Description 'Late Rectors Prize' legible. Numeric '13 1 0' is clear and aligned to columns.

rows.description: 1 wr to Xmas last warming Hall
rows.notes: Description partly unclear ('1 wr' uncertain abbreviation). Amount '2 2 0' reads clearly in columns; description ambiguity lowers confidence.
Description and amount '3 0 0' are straightforward and well-aligned.
Name 'Dickenson' and phrase 'Balance of Rent' are legible. Amount '43 0 0' clear.
Description has one uncertain word (transcribed as 'moisty') but numeric columns '118 8 5' are well aligned and readable.

rows.description: T. Newton Cottage 1 day. net 1.60 Mid Do 3.19.8
rows.notes: Complex description with ledger notes; numeric '5 5 8' reads clearly. The text contains abbreviated amounts referenced in-line but main amounts are legible.
Description 'Bursar Furniture' readable (small uncertain parenthetical note omitted). Amount '34 10 0' clear in columns.

rows.description: Keys - Gamlen, Wilson, Child, Willet, Broadset
rows.notes: List of names as keys recipients clear. Amount '5 0 0' clearly aligned.

rows.description: Masters compos. Fund closed out see Caution Book July 11. 1867
rows.notes: Long descriptive note referencing a caution book; amount '15 8 8' is neatly written and columns align. Slight ink flourish around text reduces readability marginally.
Phrase 'By sale of small stones' legible. Amount '10 0 0' clear and centered in numeric columns.
Description and amount '6 6 6' are clear. All numeric values fall within valid ranges.

rows.description: Money advanced to Pelham. Return of
rows.notes: Description legible though line ends mid-phrase; amount '60 0 0' is unambiguous in the pounds column.
Final boxed total at bottom right reads '1391 7 9 1/2'. Numerals and halfpenny loop are clear and columns used for alignment are unambiguous.
